creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
Created attachment 255964
re-do process to pick up (possibly) redefined $periodic_conf_files

allow $periodic_conf_files to redefined and re-read

this is similar feature that was added for rc.conf years ago in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=217533 that allows one to use extra periodic.conf files
